features.name: comb replicate operation in HW dialect to BTOR2
features.description: Code should include a comb.replicate operation that replicates a single-bit value into a multi-bit result for sign extension purposes

features.name: sign extension via extract-replicate-concat pattern
features.description: Code should include a sign extension pattern using comb.extract to get sign bit, comb.replicate to expand it, and comb.concat to combine with original value
features.snippet:
%0 = comb.extract %io_value1 from 15 : (i16) -> i1
%1 = comb.replicate %0 : (i1) -> i4
%2 = comb.concat %1, %io_value1 : i4, i16

features.name: chisel Fill function generating comb replicate
features.description: Code should include Chisel Fill function used in sign extension, which when converted to HW dialect produces comb.replicate
